final:
// // This module implements a 1-bit DRAM cell with a read and write operation. The DRAM cell consists of a storage element that can hold one bit of data, a word line to disable the cell for writing or reading, a bit line for data input/output, and a sense amplifier to read the stored bit. The write operation should be controlled by a write disable signal. The read operation should occur when the word line is inactive and the write disable is active.
module dram_cell(  
    input wire clk,  
    input wire we,  // Write Enable  
    input wire word_line,  
    input wire bit_in,  
    output reg bit_out  
);  
    reg stored_bit;  // Represents the stored bit in the DRAM cell  

    always @(posedge clk) begin  
        if (word_line) begin  
            if (we) begin  
                stored_bit <= bit_in;  // Write operation  
            end  
            bit_out <= stored_bit;  // Read operation  
        end  
    end  
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 1-bit DRAM cell with a read and write operation. The DRAM cell consists of a storage element that can hold one bit of data, a word line to disable the cell for writing or reading, a bit line for data input/output, and a sense amplifier to read the stored bit. The write operation should be controlled by a write disable signal. The read operation should occur when the word line is inactive and the write disable is active.
